title: Case Study: Building a Robust File Reader
source_outline: Building a robust file reader: logging bad rows and continuing; separating valid from invalid data

artifact_plan.depth_signals: capstone/synthesis topic; substantial end-to-end worked program in 4 moves (fragile -> guard -> validate -> report/write); Implementation is the heart; Lab week (P5.6 capstone)
artifact_plan.diagram_intent: data-flow pipeline: CSV row -> validate -> [valid bucket / invalid bucket + logged reason] -> clean CSV out; the two-bucket split is the topic's core idea

next_assessment.title: Python Foundations Diagnostic
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can model data with classes, handle files and errors robustly, and maintain a professional Git portfolio - confirming readiness to begin the AI modules.
